530 Charles Bancroft Hwy, Litchfield, NH 03052, USA

I have foraged all sorts of blackberry, raspberry, and blueberry from this area, and I have even seen wild grape vines in years past. The canes here are upright and very spiky, so it can be difficult to get to the fruit from the path. Access: Private.
